Metadata.SourceFile: Striker in the Crypts of Trogan.tap
Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x140C "STRIKERINTHECRYPTSOFTROGAN-140C" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Striker in the Crypts of Trogan.prg"
